top_signals.title: Bank Rate maintained at 3.75% - June 2026 Monetary Policy Summary and Minutes
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England’s Monetary Policy Committee is responsible for making decisions about Bank Rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Fed’s Bowman Finalizes Moves to Reshape Bank-Supervision Unit
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision Michelle Bowman has completed a shakeup of the agency’s bank-oversight unit as she aims to prioritize what she sees as core financial risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Holder Andreessen Says Starship Opens Path to AI in Space
top_signals.summary: Andreessen Horowitz LLC General Partner David George, an investor in SpaceX, said the “rapid reusability” of the new Starship rocket will be crucial to delivering on Elon Musk’s bet on orbital data centers to expand AI computing capacity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: China detains two Japanese nationals over alleged rare earth smuggling

top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trade Is Slowly Opening One of the World's Most Isolated Nations
top_signals.summary: Azerbaijan is working hard to coax Turkmenistan out of its shell and integrate Ashgabat into trans-Caspian trade routes. Azerbaijani leader Ilham Aliyev exchanged a variety of trade-related agreements with Turkmenistan’s titular head of state, Serdar Berdymukhamedov, during a June 22 ceremony in Baku. A joint statement issued after the ceremony highlighted an agreement to streamline “technical specifications” concerning the movement of goods and vehicles between the two countries, and another to harmonize “customs statistics…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
